title: TEA-Sim v2.0.1: Auditable trust-evidence reference artefacts
description: Reference implementation and reproducibility artefacts for auditable trust-evidence boundaries in health information systems. This archive is the published v2.0.1 software record associated with DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21226180. It does not claim production deployment, certification, legal compliance, clinical validation or complete formal verification.
notes: Current version DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21226180. Previous version DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21193829. GitHub repository: https://github.com/antonioclim/TEA-Sim-TrustEvidence. GitHub release: https://github.com/antonioclim/TEA-Sim-TrustEvidence/releases/tag/v2.0.1.
